rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF FRANCES F CUENY
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion By R. Schafer Against G. Fuller Compelling Interrogatory Response; Compelling Inspection Demand Responses; Deeming Requests For Admission Admitted And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions; P & A
rulings.Rulings: Motion By Robert Schafer Compelling Georgia Fuller To Respond To Interrogatories, Inspection Demands, Deeming Requests For Admissions Admitted is granted. No opposition has been filed. Respondent's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Respondent is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded against Georgia Fuller in the amount of $1,375, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. (612/HEWLETT)
